subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of guidance, when the Manifestation of the Cause of his Lord, the Lord of the Last and the First, appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الهدی اذ ظهر مظهر امر ربه مالک الاخره و الاولی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
